message.content: How do I load a local GGUF embedding model with node-llama-cpp?
Why does Bun hang when the process exits after loading the model?
Can I cache embeddings to avoid recomputing them?

content.text:
Yes — store embeddings keyed by SHA-256 of the input text:

```sql
CREATE TABLE embedding_cache (
  query_hash TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  embedding BLOB NOT NULL,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL
);
```

On query: hash the text, check cache, only embed on miss. For session recall this reduces warm query latency from ~50ms to ~1ms.
